name: Magic: The Gathering - Foundations Booster Box
description: Experience the core of Magic with this comprehensive booster box featuring reprints of beloved cards and new additions perfect for both new and veteran players.

name: Pokemon TCG - Scarlet & Violet Base Set Booster Box
description: Discover the Paldea region with this exciting booster box featuring new Pokemon and powerful cards from the Scarlet & Violet series.

name: Yu-Gi-Oh! - Age of Overlords Booster Box
description: Unleash powerful new strategies with the Age of Overlords booster set, featuring game-changing cards and stunning artwork.

name: Disney Lorcana - Into the Inklands Booster Box
description: Explore new realms in the Disney Lorcana trading card game with Into the Inklands, featuring beloved Disney characters in stunning new artwork.

name: One Piece Card Game - Kingdoms of Intrigue Booster Box
description: Set sail with the Straw Hat Pirates in this exciting booster box featuring characters and scenes from the Kingdoms of Intrigue arc.

name: Flesh and Blood - Part the Mistveil Booster Box
description: Discover the mysteries of the Mistveil with this atmospheric booster box featuring new mechanics and beautiful artwork.

name: Magic: The Gathering - Murders at Karlov Manor Bundle
description: Solve the mystery in this thrilling Magic set bundle featuring detective-themed gameplay and noir-inspired artwork.

name: Pokemon TCG - Paldean Fates Elite Trainer Box
description: Experience the beauty of shiny Pokemon with this special Elite Trainer Box featuring alternate art cards and premium accessories.

name: Tarkir Dragonstorm Bundle
description: Experience the power of dragons with this premium bundle featuring exclusive cards and collectibles from the Tarkir Dragonstorm set.

name: Edge of Eternities Collector Box
description: Delve into the mysteries of eternity with this collector's edition featuring rare foil cards and exclusive artwork.

name: Tarkir Play Booster Display
description: Perfect for drafting and casual play, this display box contains 36 play booster packs from the Tarkir set.

name: Digimon Card Game - Exceed Apocalypse Booster Box
description: Enter the digital world with powerful new Digimon and devastating attacks in this action-packed booster box.

name: Star Wars: Unlimited - Spark of Rebellion Booster Box
description: Join the Rebellion with this inaugural booster box featuring iconic characters and vehicles from the Star Wars universe.
